returns._0: The Controller as an IController interface

setController(address).details: Only the current controller can set a new controller

syncAllContracts().details: This function will cache all the contracts using the latest addresses. Anyone can call the function whenever a Proxy contract change in the controller to ensure the protocol is using the latest version.

controller().notice: Get the Controller that manages this contract

setController(address).notice: Set the controller that manages this contract

syncAllContracts().notice: Sync protocol contract addresses from the Controller registry
